chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 863 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.311/2015 2. For regular hearing 18.11.2025 Mr. Faisal Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner alongwith Mr. Hubdar Ali, Executive Legal, PTCL Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent alongwith Mr. Rahat Naseem, Assistant Director, Directorate of Intelligence (Customs), Karachi Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press instant petition, which is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
